name: list_transactions
description: List transactions for a specific Mercury account with optional filtering by date range, status, and transaction type. Returns details including amounts, counterparties, and transaction metadata.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the Mercury account.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Start date filter in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End date filter in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of transactions to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of transactions to skip for pagination.
